title: llama.cpp
description: Run llama.cpp inference using serverless RunPod workers!

input.name: Command line arguments for llama-server
input.description: Launch command line arguments (argv) for the llama-server binary. Do not define the port. If using caching, do not define -hf or -m here.

input.name: Hugging Face Hub model name for cached model
input.description: Hugging Face Hub model name to use for the cached GGUF model. Leave empty to disable caching. Example: user/model-name

input.name: Path to GGUF file in the Hugging Face Hub model repository
input.description: Path to the GGUF file in the Hugging Face Hub model repository to use for caching. Example: model.gguf

input.name: Optional multimodal projector path
input.description: Path to an mmproj GGUF in the same cached Hugging Face repository. Leave empty for text-only inference.

input.name: llama-server startup timeout
input.description: Maximum seconds to wait for llama-server initialization.

input.name: Maximum Concurrency
input.description: Maximum number of concurrent requests to handle (default: 8).
